name: io.github.srivastsh/bart-mcp
title: BART Real-Time Transit
description: Real-time BART departures, trip planning, fares, stations, and advisories.

tools.name: bart_stations
tools.description: List all BART stations with codes, addresses, and cities

tools.name: bart_departures
tools.description: Real-time departures from any BART station

tools.name: bart_trip
tools.description: Plan a trip between two BART stations

tools.name: bart_fare
tools.description: Get fare between two BART stations

tools.name: bart_advisories
tools.description: Current BART service advisories and delays
